research_text: Zoe Martinez manages brand integrity and anti-counterfeiting programs at Acme Consumer Brands. She reports to Marcus Williams and coordinates with supply chain, sales, and marketing on enforcement actions. She recently oversaw a takedown campaign on two e-commerce platforms where Acme products were being counterfeited. She uses a mix of manual monitoring and a legacy tool that has not been updated in two years. She has been evaluating newer platforms that provide automated detection and bulk takedown capabilities.
offer_lock: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
cta_offer_lock: Open to a quick 15-minute chat next week?

company_context.current_product: Trademark Search, Screening, and Brand Protection
company_context.company_notes: Corsearch is the global leader in trademark clearance, brand protection, and IP enforcement. Trusted by over 5,000 brands across pharma, FMCG, tech, and retail. We help IP teams eliminate risk from similar marks before filing, monitor live infringement, and act on counterfeits at scale.
